test-case.description: CMS-decrypts the vault password and unlocks the SecretStore
test-case.name: Connect-ImperionSecretStore.CMS-decrypts the vault password and unlocks the SecretStore

test-case.description: throws an actionable error when the CMS password file is missing
test-case.name: Connect-ImperionSecretStore.throws an actionable error when the CMS password file is missing

test-case.description: acquires a token and returns its access token
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAccessToken.acquires a token and returns its access token

test-case.description: caches per (tenant, resource) so a second call does not re-acquire
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAccessToken.caches per (tenant, resource) so a second call does not re-acquire

test-case.description: acquires separately for a different tenant or resource
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAccessToken.acquires separately for a different tenant or resource

test-case.description: re-acquires when the cached token is near expiry
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAccessToken.re-acquires when the cached token is near expiry

test-case.description: throws when the certificate has no accessible private key
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAccessToken.throws when the certificate has no accessible private key

test-case.description: flattens companies to the standard bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskCompany.flattens companies to the standard bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when a company omits optional fields
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskCompany.does not throw when a company omits optional fields

test-case.description: queries the Companies entity with an incremental filter when -SinceDays is given
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskCompany.queries the Companies entity with an incremental filter when -SinceDays is given

test-case.description: flattens contacts to the standard bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskContact.flattens contacts to the standard bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when a contact omits optional fields
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskContact.does not throw when a contact omits optional fields

test-case.description: queries the Contacts entity with an incremental filter when -SinceDays is given
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskContact.queries the Contacts entity with an incremental filter when -SinceDays is given

test-case.description: maps the secret names to Autotask auth headers and resolves the zone
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskContext.maps the secret names to Autotask auth headers and resolves the zone

test-case.description: flattens contracts to the standard bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskContract.flattens contracts to the standard bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when a contract omits optional fields
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskContract.does not throw when a contract omits optional fields

test-case.description: queries Contracts incrementally on lastModifiedDateTime when -SinceDays is given
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskContract.queries Contracts incrementally on lastModifiedDateTime when -SinceDays is given

test-case.description: flattens tickets to the standard bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskTicket.flattens tickets to the standard bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when a ticket omits optional fields
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskTicket.does not throw when a ticket omits optional fields

test-case.description: queries Tickets incrementally on lastActivityDate when -SinceDays is given
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskTicket.queries Tickets incrementally on lastActivityDate when -SinceDays is given

test-case.description: returns the discovered zone url with the /V1.0 suffix
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskZone.returns the discovered zone url with the /V1.0 suffix

test-case.description: escapes the user name into the discovery query string
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskZone.escapes the user name into the discovery query string

test-case.description: caches per user so discovery runs only once
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskZone.caches per user so discovery runs only once

test-case.description: throws when zoneInformation returns no url (null value)
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskZone.throws when zoneInformation returns no url (null value)

test-case.description: throws (not a StrictMode error) when the body omits url entirely
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAutotaskZone.throws (not a StrictMode error) when the body omits url entirely

test-case.description: flattens resources, parses the resource group from the id, and joins tags
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureResource.flattens resources, parses the resource group from the id, and joins tags

test-case.description: does not throw when a resource has no tags or sku
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureResource.does not throw when a resource has no tags or sku

test-case.description: queries the subscription resources path
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureResource.queries the subscription resources path

test-case.description: flattens a tags object to k=v; k=v
test-case.name: ConvertTo-ImperionTagString.flattens a tags object to k=v; k=v

test-case.description: returns $null for no tags
test-case.name: ConvertTo-ImperionTagString.returns $null for no tags

test-case.description: flattens resource groups (with tags) to the bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureResourceGroup.flattens resource groups (with tags) to the bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when a resource group has no tags
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureResourceGroup.does not throw when a resource group has no tags

test-case.description: queries the subscription resourcegroups path
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureResourceGroup.queries the subscription resourcegroups path

test-case.description: flattens subscriptions to the standard bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureSubscription.flattens subscriptions to the standard bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when a subscription omits subscriptionPolicies
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureSubscription.does not throw when a subscription omits subscriptionPolicies

test-case.description: requests the subscriptions ARM path
test-case.name: Get-ImperionAzureSubscription.requests the subscriptions ARM path

test-case.description: flattens compromises to the bronze envelope (source darkwebid) and joins exposedData
test-case.name: Get-ImperionDarkWebIdCompromise.flattens compromises to the bronze envelope (source darkwebid) and joins exposedData

test-case.description: does not throw when a compromise omits exposedData
test-case.name: Get-ImperionDarkWebIdCompromise.does not throw when a compromise omits exposedData

test-case.description: scopes the query to a domain when -Domain is given
test-case.name: Get-ImperionDarkWebIdCompromise.scopes the query to a domain when -Domain is given

test-case.description: flattens configuration (device) attributes to the bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionITGlueConfiguration.flattens configuration (device) attributes to the bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when a configuration omits optional attributes
test-case.name: Get-ImperionITGlueConfiguration.does not throw when a configuration omits optional attributes

test-case.description: requests the configurations endpoint
test-case.name: Get-ImperionITGlueConfiguration.requests the configurations endpoint

test-case.description: flattens contact attributes and joins the contact-emails array
test-case.name: Get-ImperionITGlueContact.flattens contact attributes and joins the contact-emails array

test-case.description: does not throw when a contact has no emails
test-case.name: Get-ImperionITGlueContact.does not throw when a contact has no emails

test-case.description: requests the contacts endpoint
test-case.name: Get-ImperionITGlueContact.requests the contacts endpoint

test-case.description: flattens organization attributes to the bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionITGlueOrganization.flattens organization attributes to the bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when an organization omits optional attributes

test-case.description: requests the organizations endpoint with the configured base + api key
test-case.name: Get-ImperionITGlueOrganization.requests the organizations endpoint with the configured base + api key

test-case.description: reads a secret from the configured vault and returns its value
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKeyVaultSecret.reads a secret from the configured vault and returns its value

test-case.description: honours an explicit -VaultUri over config
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKeyVaultSecret.honours an explicit -VaultUri over config

test-case.description: throws when no vault URI is available
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKeyVaultSecret.throws when no vault URI is available

test-case.description: throws when the secret has no value
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKeyVaultSecret.throws when the secret has no value

test-case.description: composes one knowledge_object row per account with the gold envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeAccount.composes one knowledge_object row per account with the gold envelope

test-case.description: writes the contacts, opportunities, contracts, and tickets into the body text
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeAccount.writes the contacts, opportunities, contracts, and tickets into the body text

test-case.description: produces a stable content hash for unchanged data (idempotency key)
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeAccount.produces a stable content hash for unchanged data (idempotency key)

test-case.description: returns nothing (and does not throw) when there are no accounts
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeAccount.returns nothing (and does not throw) when there are no accounts

test-case.description: composes one knowledge_object row per artifact with assessment context
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeAssessmentArtifact.composes one knowledge_object row per artifact with assessment context

test-case.description: has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeAssessmentArtifact.has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash

test-case.description: falls back to a generated title when the artifact has none
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeAssessmentArtifact.falls back to a generated title when the artifact has none

test-case.description: returns nothing (and does not throw) when there are no artifacts
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeAssessmentArtifact.returns nothing (and does not throw) when there are no artifacts

test-case.description: composes one knowledge_object row per contract with per-entity granularity
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeContract.composes one knowledge_object row per contract with per-entity granularity

test-case.description: returns nothing (and does not throw) when bronze is empty
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeContract.returns nothing (and does not throw) when bronze is empty

test-case.description: composes one knowledge_object row per exposure with the exposure facts
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeCredentialExposure.composes one knowledge_object row per exposure with the exposure facts

test-case.description: keeps plaintext credentials out of gold — only the password status word appears
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeCredentialExposure.keeps plaintext credentials out of gold — only the password status word appears

test-case.description: has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeCredentialExposure.has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash

test-case.description: returns nothing (and does not throw) when silver is empty
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeCredentialExposure.returns nothing (and does not throw) when silver is empty

test-case.description: composes one knowledge_object row per device across both inventory arms
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeDevice.composes one knowledge_object row per device across both inventory arms

test-case.description: writes the device facts and inventory origin into the body text
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeDevice.writes the device facts and inventory origin into the body text

test-case.description: has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeDevice.has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash

test-case.description: returns nothing (and does not throw) when both arms are empty
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeDevice.returns nothing (and does not throw) when both arms are empty

test-case.description: composes one knowledge_object row per tenant, stamped with ITS tenant
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgePosture.composes one knowledge_object row per tenant, stamped with ITS tenant

test-case.description: writes the score, per-type drift counts, and named gaps into the body
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgePosture.writes the score, per-type drift counts, and named gaps into the body

test-case.description: degrades gracefully for a tenant with no score and no policies
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgePosture.degrades gracefully for a tenant with no score and no policies

test-case.description: has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgePosture.has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash

test-case.description: restricts to one tenant when -TenantId is passed
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgePosture.restricts to one tenant when -TenantId is passed

test-case.description: returns nothing (and does not throw) when no posture bronze exists
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgePosture.returns nothing (and does not throw) when no posture bronze exists

test-case.description: composes one knowledge_object row per proposal with opportunity/account context
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeProposal.composes one knowledge_object row per proposal with opportunity/account context

test-case.description: has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeProposal.has the knowledge metadata shape and a stable content hash

test-case.description: returns nothing (and does not throw) when there are no proposals
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeProposal.returns nothing (and does not throw) when there are no proposals

test-case.description: composes one knowledge_object row per ticket including description + resolution
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeTicket.composes one knowledge_object row per ticket including description + resolution

test-case.description: returns nothing (and does not throw) when bronze is empty
test-case.name: Get-ImperionKnowledgeTicket.returns nothing (and does not throw) when bronze is empty

test-case.description: flattens managed devices to the standard bronze envelope
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365Device.flattens managed devices to the standard bronze envelope

test-case.description: does not throw when a device omits optional fields
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365Device.does not throw when a device omits optional fields

test-case.description: collects from the requested tenant via GDAP token
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365Device.collects from the requested tenant via GDAP token

test-case.description: keeps only the mail the cross-org filter accepts, and flattens it
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365Mail.keeps only the mail the cross-org filter accepts, and flattens it

test-case.description: keeps client-tenant mail involving @imperionllc.com (ClientTenant mode)
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365Mail.keeps client-tenant mail involving @imperionllc.com (ClientTenant mode)

test-case.description: does not throw on a message missing cc/from and returns nothing when no mail qualifies
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365Mail.does not throw on a message missing cc/from and returns nothing when no mail qualifies

test-case.description: keeps only the chats the cross-org filter accepts and flattens them
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365TeamsChat.keeps only the chats the cross-org filter accepts and flattens them

test-case.description: keeps a client-tenant chat that includes @imperionllc.com (real filter, ClientTenant)
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365TeamsChat.keeps a client-tenant chat that includes @imperionllc.com (real filter, ClientTenant)

test-case.description: does not throw on a chat with no members
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365TeamsChat.does not throw on a chat with no members

test-case.description: keeps only the meetings the cross-org filter accepts and flattens them
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365TeamsMeeting.keeps only the meetings the cross-org filter accepts and flattens them

test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365TeamsMeeting.keeps a client-tenant meeting that includes @imperionllc.com (real filter, ClientTenant)

test-case.description: does not throw on a meeting with no attendees
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365TeamsMeeting.does not throw on a meeting with no attendees

test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365User.flattens users to the standard bronze envelope and joins businessPhones

test-case.description: does not throw when a user omits optional fields (e.g. no businessPhones)
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365User.does not throw when a user omits optional fields (e.g. no businessPhones)

test-case.description: mints a Graph token for the requested tenant
test-case.name: Get-ImperionM365User.mints a Graph token for the requested tenant

test-case.description: returns the value of an existing member
test-case.name: Get-ImperionMember.returns the value of an existing member

test-case.description: returns $null for a missing member instead of throwing (StrictMode-safe)

test-case.description: reads a member name that contains a dot (e.g. @odata.nextLink)

test-case.description: returns $null when the input object itself is $null
test-case.name: Get-ImperionMember.returns $null when the input object itself is $null

test-case.description: returns the five posture policy types with unique keys
test-case.name: Get-ImperionPolicyCatalog.returns the five posture policy types with unique keys

test-case.description: each entry has Key/Source/Observed/Golden and golden tables end in _golden
test-case.name: Get-ImperionPolicyCatalog.each entry has Key/Source/Observed/Golden and golden tables end in _golden

test-case.description: classifies one policy type and stamps policy_type on each row

test-case.description: evaluates all five policy types when none is specified
test-case.name: Get-ImperionPolicyDrift.evaluates all five policy types when none is specified

test-case.description: passes the tenant id as a parameter (no inline interpolation)
test-case.name: Get-ImperionPolicyDrift.passes the tenant id as a parameter (no inline interpolation)

test-case.description: resolves a nested dotted path on objects
test-case.name: Get-ImperionPropertyPath.resolves a nested dotted path on objects

test-case.description: returns $null (no throw) on a missing hop

test-case.description: supports dictionary (hashtable) hops
test-case.name: Get-ImperionPropertyPath.supports dictionary (hashtable) hops

test-case.description: returns an array hop as-is
test-case.name: Get-ImperionPropertyPath.returns an array hop as-is

test-case.description: passes null through as null
test-case.name: Format-ImperionScalar.passes null through as null

test-case.description: formats datetime as ISO 8601 round-trip
test-case.name: Format-ImperionScalar.formats datetime as ISO 8601 round-trip

test-case.description: lowercases booleans
test-case.name: Format-ImperionScalar.lowercases booleans

test-case.description: joins arrays with the standard delimiter
test-case.name: Format-ImperionScalar.joins arrays with the standard delimiter

test-case.description: serializes a nested object to compact JSON
test-case.name: Format-ImperionScalar.serializes a nested object to compact JSON

test-case.description: passes a plain string through unchanged
test-case.name: Format-ImperionScalar.passes a plain string through unchanged

test-case.description: flattens reports to the bronze envelope with source televy
test-case.name: Get-ImperionTelivyReport.flattens reports to the bronze envelope with source televy

test-case.description: does not throw when a report omits optional fields
test-case.name: Get-ImperionTelivyReport.does not throw when a report omits optional fields

test-case.description: sends the Telivy api key and reports path to the connect layer
test-case.name: Get-ImperionTelivyReport.sends the Telivy api key and reports path to the connect layer

test-case.description: sends the pinned model, dimension, and input_type
test-case.name: Get-ImperionVoyageEmbedding.sends the pinned model, dimension, and input_type

test-case.description: returns one embedding per input, in order, with the billed token total
test-case.name: Get-ImperionVoyageEmbedding.returns one embedding per input, in order, with the billed token total

test-case.description: batches inputs beyond the API batch size into multiple calls
test-case.name: Get-ImperionVoyageEmbedding.batches inputs beyond the API batch size into multiple calls

test-case.description: refuses a wrong-dimension vector (vector spaces never mix)
test-case.name: Get-ImperionVoyageEmbedding.refuses a wrong-dimension vector (vector spaces never mix)

test-case.description: resolves the API key from the SecretStore when the vault is unlocked
test-case.name: Get-ImperionVoyageEmbedding.resolves the API key from the SecretStore when the vault is unlocked

test-case.description: falls back to the Key Vault secret when the SecretStore is not unlocked (ADR-0009)
test-case.name: Get-ImperionVoyageEmbedding.falls back to the Key Vault secret when the SecretStore is not unlocked (ADR-0009)

test-case.description: is stable regardless of property order
test-case.name: Get-ImperionContentHash.is stable regardless of property order

test-case.description: ignores excluded volatile fields
test-case.name: Get-ImperionContentHash.ignores excluded volatile fields

test-case.description: changes when a meaningful field changes
test-case.name: Get-ImperionContentHash.changes when a meaningful field changes

test-case.description: flattens with the standard envelope and a content hash

test-case.description: supports scriptblock selectors

test-case.description: throws an actionable error when the config file is missing

test-case.description: throws an actionable error when no Npgsql assembly can be loaded

test-case.description: gates the vault config + CMS write behind ShouldProcess (nothing under -WhatIf)

test-case.description: surfaces a missing certificate (Get-Item -ErrorAction Stop)
test-case.name: Initialize-ImperionUnattended.surfaces a missing certificate (Get-Item -ErrorAction Stop)

test-case.description: returns all items and follows nextLink across pages
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionArmRequest.returns all items and follows nextLink across pages

test-case.description: does not throw when the body has no value or nextLink (single resource)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionArmRequest.does not throw when the body has no value or nextLink (single resource)

test-case.description: expands a relative path to the management base and sends the bearer token

test-case.description: passes a full URL through unchanged
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionArmRequest.passes a full URL through unchanged

test-case.description: returns all items and follows pageDetails.nextPageUrl across pages
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionAutotaskRequest.returns all items and follows pageDetails.nextPageUrl across pages

test-case.description: builds the query path with an url-encoded search filter
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionAutotaskRequest.builds the query path with an url-encoded search filter

test-case.description: passes a custom incremental filter through to the search payload
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionAutotaskRequest.passes a custom incremental filter through to the search payload

test-case.description: does not throw when the response omits items or pageDetails (StrictMode-safe)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionAutotaskRequest.does not throw when the response omits items or pageDetails (StrictMode-safe)

test-case.description: does not throw and flattens a resource that has no tags or sku

test-case.description: joins resource tags into the flat cell when present
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionAzureInventorySync.joins resource tags into the flat cell when present

test-case.description: returns a zero tally without touching the DB for empty input
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionBronzeUpsert.returns a zero tally without touching the DB for empty input

test-case.description: counts inserted / updated / unchanged from the RETURNING reader
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionBronzeUpsert.counts inserted / updated / unchanged from the RETURNING reader

test-case.description: emits change-detecting upsert SQL (ON CONFLICT + content_hash guard + RETURNING xmax)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionBronzeUpsert.emits change-detecting upsert SQL (ON CONFLICT + content_hash guard + RETURNING xmax)

test-case.description: casts JSON columns to jsonb and binds one parameter per cell
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionBronzeUpsert.casts JSON columns to jsonb and binds one parameter per cell

test-case.description: honors custom key columns in the conflict target
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionBronzeUpsert.honors custom key columns in the conflict target

test-case.description: -NoChangeDetect omits the content_hash guard (ADR-0039 per-source shape)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionBronzeUpsert.-NoChangeDetect omits the content_hash guard (ADR-0039 per-source shape)

test-case.description: follows the JSON:API links.next cursor across pages
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDarkWebIdRequest.follows the JSON:API links.next cursor across pages

test-case.description: does not throw when neither data nor links is present (StrictMode-safe)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDarkWebIdRequest.does not throw when neither data nor links is present (StrictMode-safe)

test-case.description: returns the affected row count from ExecuteNonQuery
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDbNonQuery.returns the affected row count from ExecuteNonQuery

test-case.description: binds named parameters (null -> DBNull)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDbNonQuery.binds named parameters (null -> DBNull)

test-case.description: works with no parameters
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDbNonQuery.works with no parameters

test-case.description: maps each reader row to a PSCustomObject with the column values
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDbQuery.maps each reader row to a PSCustomObject with the column values

test-case.description: converts DBNull columns to $null
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDbQuery.converts DBNull columns to $null

test-case.description: returns an empty result for no rows
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDbQuery.returns an empty result for no rows

test-case.description: binds named parameters (null -> DBNull)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionDbQuery.binds named parameters (null -> DBNull)

test-case.description: returns all items and follows @odata.nextLink across pages
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionGraphRequest.returns all items and follows @odata.nextLink across pages

test-case.description: does not throw when the body has no value or nextLink (single resource)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionGraphRequest.does not throw when the body has no value or nextLink (single resource)

test-case.description: sends the bearer token and ConsistencyLevel header
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionGraphRequest.sends the bearer token and ConsistencyLevel header

test-case.description: expands a relative path and appends $select
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionGraphRequest.expands a relative path and appends $select

test-case.description: exports records and does not throw when a record lacks attributes
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueExport.exports records and does not throw when a record lacks attributes

test-case.description: routes a mixed batch by per-row entity, strips the discriminator, and sums the tallies
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueExportToBronze.routes a mixed batch by per-row entity, strips the discriminator, and sums the tallies

test-case.description: applies -Entity to rows without a per-row discriminator
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueExportToBronze.applies -Entity to rows without a per-row discriminator

test-case.description: fails loudly on an unknown entity (never invents a table)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueExportToBronze.fails loudly on an unknown entity (never invents a table)

test-case.description: throws when a row has no entity and no -Entity was supplied
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueExportToBronze.throws when a row has no entity and no -Entity was supplied

test-case.description: reuses a supplied connection and does not open or dispose one
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueExportToBronze.reuses a supplied connection and does not open or dispose one

test-case.description: writes nothing and opens no connection for empty input
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueExportToBronze.writes nothing and opens no connection for empty input

test-case.description: honours -WhatIf: no upsert, no connection
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueExportToBronze.honours -WhatIf: no upsert, no connection

test-case.description: pages a GET collection by following links.next
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueRequest.pages a GET collection by following links.next

test-case.description: does not throw on the last page when links is absent
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueRequest.does not throw on the last page when links is absent

test-case.description: sends the x-api-key header and builds the base + query
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueRequest.sends the x-api-key header and builds the base + query

test-case.description: returns the raw parsed body for a non-GET (write) request
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionITGlueRequest.returns the raw parsed body for a non-GET (write) request

test-case.description: loads Autotask contracts via the connect layer (no inline zone/paging)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionKaseyaImport.loads Autotask contracts via the connect layer (no inline zone/paging)

test-case.description: loads KQM proposals and does not throw when the body has no data wrapper
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionKaseyaImport.loads KQM proposals and does not throw when the body has no data wrapper

test-case.description: does not throw and splits Defender vs Intune when a config policy lacks templateReference
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionPolicySync.does not throw and splits Defender vs Intune when a config policy lacks templateReference

test-case.description: reads the literal @odata.type property for device configurations
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionPolicySync.reads the literal @odata.type property for device configurations

test-case.description: returns the response on a 2xx without retrying
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionRestWithRetry.returns the response on a 2xx without retrying

test-case.description: retries on 429 honoring Retry-After, then returns the success
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionRestWithRetry.retries on 429 honoring Retry-After, then returns the success

test-case.description: uses exponential backoff when no Retry-After header is present
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionRestWithRetry.uses exponential backoff when no Retry-After header is present

test-case.description: throws immediately on a non-retryable 4xx
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionRestWithRetry.throws immediately on a non-retryable 4xx

test-case.description: retries up to MaxAttempts then throws the final HTTP status on persistent 503
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionRestWithRetry.retries up to MaxAttempts then throws the final HTTP status on persistent 503

test-case.description: does not throw when secureScore / control-profile items omit optional fields
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionSecureScoreSync.does not throw when secureScore / control-profile items omit optional fields

test-case.description: flattens enabledServices / threats when present
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionSecureScoreSync.flattens enabledServices / threats when present

test-case.description: does not throw on a service principal that omits optional collections
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionServicePrincipalSync.does not throw on a service principal that omits optional collections

test-case.description: computes the nearest credential expiry when keyCredentials are present
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionServicePrincipalSync.computes the nearest credential expiry when keyCredentials are present

test-case.description: sends the x-api-key header and returns the data collection
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionTelivyRequest.sends the x-api-key header and returns the data collection

test-case.description: follows the JSON:API links.next cursor across pages
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionTelivyRequest.follows the JSON:API links.next cursor across pages

test-case.description: returns the body as a single item when the collection property is absent
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionTelivyRequest.returns the body as a single item when the collection property is absent

test-case.description: does not throw when neither data nor links is present (StrictMode-safe)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionTelivyRequest.does not throw when neither data nor links is present (StrictMode-safe)

test-case.description: honors custom items/next property paths
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionTelivyRequest.honors custom items/next property paths

test-case.description: embeds a new knowledge object and writes its chunk rows
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionVectorizeKnowledge.embeds a new knowledge object and writes its chunk rows

test-case.description: stamps the pinned contract on every inserted chunk row
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionVectorizeKnowledge.stamps the pinned contract on every inserted chunk row

test-case.description: skips an object whose chunk hashes are already embedded (no re-bill)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionVectorizeKnowledge.skips an object whose chunk hashes are already embedded (no re-bill)

test-case.description: honours -WhatIf (counts the work, calls neither Voyage nor the DB writers)
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionVectorizeKnowledge.honours -WhatIf (counts the work, calls neither Voyage nor the DB writers)

test-case.description: returns a zero tally when there are no knowledge objects
test-case.name: Invoke-ImperionVectorizeKnowledge.returns a zero tally when there are no knowledge objects

test-case.description: joins a piped array with the default delimiter
test-case.name: Join-ImperionValues.joins a piped array with the default delimiter

test-case.description: joins an array passed by -Value (not unrolled per element)
test-case.name: Join-ImperionValues.joins an array passed by -Value (not unrolled per element)

test-case.description: honors a custom delimiter
test-case.name: Join-ImperionValues.honors a custom delimiter

test-case.description: passes a single scalar through as its string form
test-case.name: Join-ImperionValues.passes a single scalar through as its string form

test-case.description: treats a string as one value, not a character sequence
test-case.name: Join-ImperionValues.treats a string as one value, not a character sequence

test-case.description: returns $null for null or empty input
test-case.name: Join-ImperionValues.returns $null for null or empty input

test-case.description: builds one task action per sync cmdlet and registers nothing under -WhatIf
test-case.name: Register-ImperionTask.builds one task action per sync cmdlet and registers nothing under -WhatIf

test-case.description: schedules the knowledge + vectorization sync after the ingest tasks (ADR-0009)

test-case.description: embeds Import-Module + Initialize-ImperionContext + the cmdlet in the task action

test-case.description: runs each task under the supplied gMSA/service identity
test-case.name: Register-ImperionTask.runs each task under the supplied gMSA/service identity

test-case.description: throws when pwsh cannot be resolved
test-case.name: Register-ImperionTask.throws when pwsh cannot be resolved

test-case.description: returns one trimmed chunk when the text fits

test-case.description: splits long text into multiple chunks no larger than MaxChars

test-case.description: carries overlap so adjacent chunks share boundary context

test-case.description: prefers a paragraph boundary near the window end
test-case.name: Split-ImperionTextChunk.prefers a paragraph boundary near the window end

test-case.description: is deterministic — same input, same chunks
test-case.name: Split-ImperionTextChunk.is deterministic — same input, same chunks
